notes: Fish, cooking, crafting, shipping, perfection totals, monster goals, and stardrop sources are built from Stardew Valley Wiki pages stored in /data/raw.
Villager heart targets follow the perfection note on the wiki: datable villagers max at 8 hearts for perfection, non-datable villagers at 10.

perfectionCategories.name: Produce & Forage Shipped
perfectionCategories.requirement: Ship one of every item in the Items Shipped (Farm & Forage) tab in the collections menu.

perfectionCategories.name: Obelisks on Farm
perfectionCategories.requirement: Build Earth Obelisk, Water Obelisk, Desert Obelisk, and Island Obelisk on the farm .

perfectionCategories.name: Golden Clock on Farm
perfectionCategories.requirement: Build Gold Clock on the farm .

perfectionCategories.name: Monster Slayer Hero
perfectionCategories.requirement: Complete all monster eradication goals for the Adventurer's Guild .

perfectionCategories.name: Great Friends
perfectionCategories.requirement: Reach maximum hearts with every villager . This includes Kent, so it is not possible to complete this in year 1. Note: The "maximum hearts" for datable villagers is 8, and for non-datable villagers, 10 is the max. If the player has children, their friendship status does not affect the score.

perfectionCategories.name: Crafting Recipes Made
perfectionCategories.requirement: Craft all items. The Wedding Ring is not required, even in Multiplayer games.

perfectionCategories.name: Fish Caught
perfectionCategories.requirement: Catch every fish in the Fish tab in the collections menu.

perfectionCategories.name: Golden Walnuts found
perfectionCategories.requirement: Find all Golden Walnuts on Ginger Island .

recipes.name: Dehydrator

recipes.name: Basic Fertilizer
recipes.description: Improves soil quality a little, increasing your chance to grow quality crops. Mix into tilled soil.

recipes.name: Quality Fertilizer
recipes.description: Improves soil quality, increasing your chance to grow quality crops. Mix into tilled soil.

recipes.name: Deluxe Fertilizer
recipes.description: Greatly improves soil quality, increasing your chance to grow quality crops. Mix into tilled soil.

recipes.name: Speed-Gro
recipes.description: Stimulates leaf production. Guaranteed to increase growth rate by at least 10%. Mix into tilled soil.

recipes.name: Deluxe Speed-Gro
recipes.description: Stimulates leaf production. Guaranteed to increase growth rate by at least 25%. Mix into tilled soil.

recipes.name: Hyper Speed-Gro
recipes.description: Greatly stimulates leaf production. Guaranteed to increase growth rate by at least 33%. Mix into tilled soil.

recipes.name: Basic Retaining Soil
recipes.description: This soil has a chance of staying watered overnight. Mix into tilled soil.

recipes.name: Quality Retaining Soil
recipes.description: This soil has a good chance of staying watered overnight. Mix into tilled soil.

recipes.name: Deluxe Retaining Soil
recipes.description: This soil has a 100% chance of staying watered overnight. Mix into tilled soil.
recipes.recipeSource: Purchase from Island Trader for Cinder Shard (50)

recipes.name: Tree Fertilizer
recipes.description: Sprinkle on a wild tree to ensure rapid growth, even in winter. Doesn't work on fruit trees.

recipes.name: Fiber Seeds
recipes.description: Plant these in any season. Does not require watering. Harvest with the scythe. Takes 7 days to grow.

recipes.name: Mystic Tree Seed

recipes.name: Spinner
recipes.description: The shape makes it spin around in the water. Slightly increases the bite-rate when fishing.

recipes.name: Trap Bobber
recipes.description: Causes fish to escape slower when you aren't reeling them in.

recipes.name: Sonar Bobber
recipes.description: Shows what fish is on the line before it's caught.

recipes.name: Cork Bobber
recipes.description: Slightly increases the size of your "fishing bar".

recipes.name: Quality Bobber
recipes.description: Boosts the quality of fish that you catch.

recipes.name: Treasure Hunter
recipes.description: Fish don't escape while collecting treasures. Also slightly increases the chance to find treasures.

recipes.name: Dressed Spinner
recipes.description: The metal tab and colorful streamers create an enticing spectacle for fish. Increases the bite-rate when fishing.

recipes.name: Barbed Hook
recipes.description: Makes your catch more secure, causing the "fishing bar" to cling to your catch. Works best on slow, weak fish.

recipes.name: Magnet
recipes.description: Increases the chance of finding treasures when fishing. However, fish aren't crazy about the taste.

recipes.name: Bait
recipes.description: Causes fish to bite faster. Must first be attached to a fishing rod.

recipes.name: Deluxe Bait
recipes.description: Causes fish to bite even faster and increases size of the "fishing bar".

recipes.name: Wild Bait
recipes.description: A unique recipe from Linus that gives you a chance to catch two fish at once.

recipes.name: Magic Bait
recipes.description: Allows you to catch fish from any season, time, or weather, from whichever type of water you cast into.

recipes.name: Challenge Bait
recipes.description: A "perfect" catch yields triple the fish. However, each time a fish escapes the "fishing bar", the catch is reduced.

recipes.name: Crab Pot
recipes.description: Place it in the water, load it with bait, and check the next day to see if you've caught anything. Works in streams, lakes, and the ocean.

recipes.name: Sturdy Ring
recipes.description: Cuts the duration of negative status effects in half.

recipes.name: Warrior Ring
recipes.description: Occasionally infuses the wearer with "warrior energy" after slaying a monster.

recipes.name: Ring of Yoba
recipes.description: Occasionally shields the wearer from damage.

recipes.name: Thorns Ring
recipes.description: When enemies damage you, they will take damage themselves.

recipes.name: Glowstone Ring
recipes.description: Emits a constant light, and also increases your radius for collecting items.

recipes.name: Iridium Band
recipes.description: Glows, attracts items, and increases attack damage by 10%.

recipes.name: Field Snack
recipes.description: A quick snack to fuel the hungry forager.

recipes.name: Bug Steak
recipes.description: The last resort of the hungry cave diver.

recipes.name: Life Elixir
recipes.description: Restores health to full.

recipes.name: Oil of Garlic
recipes.description: Drink this and weaker monsters will avoid you.

recipes.name: Monster Musk
recipes.description: Spray this on to draw more monsters out of hiding.

recipes.name: Fairy Dust
recipes.description: Sprinkle on kegs, furnaces, and other refining equipment to instantly receive their product.

recipes.name: Warp Totem: Beach
recipes.description: Warp directly to the beach. Consumed on use.

recipes.name: Warp Totem: Mountains
recipes.description: Warp directly to the mountains. Consumed on use.

recipes.name: Warp Totem: Farm
recipes.description: Warp directly to your house. Consumed on use.

recipes.name: Warp Totem: Desert
recipes.description: Warp directly to Calico Desert. Consumed on use.

recipes.name: Warp Totem: Island
recipes.description: Warp directly to Ginger Island. Consumed on use.

recipes.name: Rain Totem
recipes.description: Activate to greatly increase the chance for rain tomorrow. Consumed on use.

recipes.name: Treasure Totem
recipes.description: Use on diggable terrain to summon a ring of treasure spots.

recipes.description: Provides a modest amount of light.

recipes.name: Charcoal Kiln
recipes.description: Turns 10 pieces of wood into one piece of coal.

recipes.name: Crystalarium
recipes.description: Insert a gem of your choice and it will grow copies.

recipes.name: Furnace
recipes.description: Turns ore and coal into metal bars.

recipes.name: Heavy Furnace
recipes.description: It's more efficient than a regular furnace. Requires 25 pieces of ore and 3 coal per use.

recipes.name: Lightning Rod
recipes.description: Collects energy from lightning storms and turns it into battery packs.

recipes.name: Solar Panel
recipes.description: Slowly generates batteries when left in the sun.

recipes.name: Recycling Machine
recipes.description: Turns fishing trash into resources.

recipes.name: Seed Maker
recipes.description: Place crops inside to produce a varying amount of seeds. Doesn't work with fruit tree crops.

recipes.name: Slime Incubator
recipes.description: Hatches slimes eggs into slimes. Allows you to raise slimes outdoors.

recipes.name: Ostrich Incubator
recipes.description: Hatches ostrich eggs into baby ostriches. Place in a barn.
recipes.recipeSource: Complete the Island Field Office Collection

recipes.name: Slime Egg-Press
recipes.description: Compresses 100 pieces of slime into a slime egg. It's a miracle of science!

recipes.name: Tapper
recipes.description: Place on a maple, oak, or pine tree and wait for the reservoir to fill with product!

recipes.name: Heavy Tapper
recipes.description: Place on a maple, oak, or pine tree and wait for the reservoir to fill with product! Works twice as fast as a normal tapper.

recipes.name: Worm Bin
recipes.description: Produces bait on a regular basis. The worms are self-sufficient.

recipes.name: Deluxe Worm Bin
recipes.description: Produces Deluxe Bait on a regular basis. The worms are self-sufficient.

recipes.name: Bone Mill
recipes.description: Turns bone items into fertilizers.

recipes.name: Geode Crusher
recipes.description: Breaks geodes open automatically.

recipes.name: Mushroom Log
recipes.description: Grows mushrooms every so often. The more wild trees are nearby, the better it works.

recipes.name: Bait Maker
recipes.description: Place a fish inside to create targeted bait.

recipes.name: Tub o' Flowers
recipes.description: Flowers planted in an oak barrel. Blooms in spring and summer.

recipes.name: Wicked Statue
recipes.description: There's something unsettling about the looks of this statue.

recipes.name: Flute Block
recipes.description: Plays a flute sound when you walk past.

recipes.name: Drum Block
recipes.description: Plays a drum sound when you walk past.

recipes.name: Chest
recipes.description: A place to store your items.

recipes.name: Stone Chest
recipes.description: A place to store your items.

recipes.name: Big Chest
recipes.description: It can store almost twice as much as a regular chest.

recipes.name: Big Stone Chest
recipes.description: It can store almost twice as much as a regular chest.

recipes.name: Wood Sign
recipes.description: Use an item on this to change what's displayed. The item won't be consumed.

recipes.name: Stone Sign
recipes.description: Use an item on this to change what's displayed. The item won't be consumed.

recipes.name: Dark Sign
recipes.description: Use an item on this to change what's displayed. The item won't be consumed.

recipes.name: Text Sign
recipes.description: You can write a custom message on this sign.

recipes.name: Garden Pot
recipes.description: Grows crops from any season when indoors. Outdoors, it can only house seasonal crops.
recipes.recipeSource: Evelyn cutscene after completing the Greenhouse

recipes.name: Scarecrow
recipes.description: Prevents crows from attacking your crops. Has a limited radius (about 8 "tiles").

recipes.name: Deluxe Scarecrow
recipes.description: Prevents crows from attacking your crops. Has a large radius (about 16 "tiles").
recipes.recipeSource: Mail the day after collecting all rarecrows

recipes.name: Staircase
recipes.description: Use this to move down a level in the mines.

recipes.name: Explosive Ammo
recipes.description: Fire this with the slingshot.

recipes.name: Transmute (Fe)
recipes.description: A bar of pure iron.

recipes.name: Transmute (Au)
recipes.description: A bar of pure gold.

recipes.name: Mini-Jukebox
recipes.description: Allows you to play your favorite tunes.

recipes.name: Mini-Obelisk
recipes.description: Place two on the farm to warp between them.

recipes.name: Farm Computer
recipes.description: Scans the farm and displays useful information.

recipes.name: Hopper
recipes.description: Items placed inside will automatically be loaded into the machine in front of it.

recipes.name: Cookout Kit
recipes.description: Use this to create a cooking campfire, allowing you to cook on-the-go!

recipes.name: Tent Kit
recipes.description: Use this to deploy a one-time-use tent for sleeping. Can only be used outdoors.

recipes.name: Statue Of The Dwarf King
recipes.description: Choose from two mining-related powers each day.

recipes.name: Statue Of Blessings
recipes.description: Touching the statue gives a unique blessing every day.

recipes.name: Anvil
recipes.description: Allows you to re-forge trinkets, randomizing their stats. Costs 3 iridium bars per use.

recipes.name: Mini-Forge
recipes.description: Now, you can use a dwarvish forge from the convenience of your home.

stardrops.name: Stardew Valley Fair
stardrops.details: Buy for 2,000 Star Tokens at the fair.

stardrops.name: The Mines Floor 100
stardrops.details: Open the treasure chest on floor 100.

stardrops.name: Spouse / Roommate
stardrops.details: Reach 12.5 hearts with your spouse or roommate.

stardrops.name: Old Master Cannoli
stardrops.details: Give a Sweet Gem Berry in the Secret Woods.

stardrops.name: Master Angler
stardrops.details: Receive Willy's letter after earning the Master Angler achievement.

stardrops.name: Museum Donation Reward
stardrops.details: Donate all 95 items to the Museum.

monsterGoals.monsterType: Slime (any color, excludes Big Slimes and Slimes in the Slime Hutch)
Void Spirits: Shadow Shaman Shadow Shaman (dangerous) Shadow Brute Shadow Brute (dangerous) Shadow Sniper
monsterGoals.rewardDescription: Gain a short speed boost whenever you slay a monster.

monsterGoals.monsterType: Bats: Bat Bat (dangerous) Frost Bat Frost Bat (dangerous) Lava Bat Iridium Bat
monsterGoals.rewardDescription: Gain a little health every time you slay a monster.
The red eyes are glowing mysteriously.

monsterGoals.monsterType: Cave Insects: Bug Bug (dangerous) Cave Fly Cave Fly (dangerous) Grub Grub (dangerous) Mutant Fly Mutant Grub Armored Bug Armored Bug (dangerous)

monsterGoals.rewardDescription: Keep your dome in one piece.

monsterGoals.monsterType: Dust Sprites: Dust Sprite Dust Sprite (dangerous)
monsterGoals.rewardDescription: Monsters have a greater chance of dropping loot.

monsterGoals.monsterType: Rock Crabs: Rock Crab Rock Crab (dangerous) Lava Crab Lava Crab (dangerous) Iridium Crab
monsterGoals.rewardDescription: The top of the ring is made from enchanted crab shell.
The type of cowboy hat worn by a wizard.
It looks just like the real thing!
When you defeat an enemy, they explode.

monsterGoals.monsterType: Magma Sprites: Magma Sprite Magma Sparker
monsterGoals.rewardDescription: Can call to utilize Item Recovery Service from home
